sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wec Energy director Klappa sells $3.47 million in stock
feed.summary: Gale E. Klappa, a director at WEC Energy Group, INC. (NYSE:WEC), sold 30,000 shares of common stock for approximately $3.47 million in mid-February 2026. Prior to the sale, Klappa exercised options to acquire the same number of shares for $2.045 million. Following these transactions, Klappa directly owns 276,600 shares, with additional shares held indirectly through an employee retirement plan.

feed.title: Hasbro CEO: ‘We’re beyond experimentation’ with AI
feed.summary: Hasbro is actively integrating AI into various operations, including financial planning, forecasting, and supply chain management, moving past the experimental phase. CEO Chris Cocks stated the company adopts a "human-centric, creator-led approach" and partners with firms like Google Gemini and OpenAI. This initiative is expected to free up over a million hours of "lower-value work," allowing employees to focus on innovation and creativity, while AI-assisted design has already reduced toy concept-to-prototype time by 80%.

feed.title: TransUnion: Purchase Mortgages To Lead Credit Expansion
feed.summary: TransUnion forecasts that mortgage originations will continue to rise through 2026, primarily driven by purchase mortgages. This growth is attributed to easing interest rates, improved affordability, and strong consumer demand, alongside a gradual recovery in refinance activity. While overall lending expansion is expected to moderate compared to 2025, mortgages and unsecured personal loans are projected to be key drivers of credit growth, though rising mortgage delinquencies highlight a need for disciplined underwriting.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering $463,000 in Auto Callable Dual Directional Barrier Notes linked to the performance of the iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF, the State Street Energy Select Sector SPDR ETF, and the Nasdaq-100 Index. These notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. The structured investment is designed for investors seeking early exit potential at a premium or uncapped/capped exposure to the least performing underlying asset at maturity, with significant risks including the potential loss of principal.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Remains a Buy on Republic Services (RSG)
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus analyst Shlomo Rosenbaum maintained a Buy rating and set a price target of $251.00 for Republic Services (RSG). The company reported solid Q3 earnings, with $4.21 billion in revenue and $550 million in net profit. Insider sentiment for RSG is positive, with an increase in insider buying over the last quarter, including a recent stock purchase by director Katharine Weymouth.

feed.title: How Booking’s Q4 Profit Beat and Mixed EPS Picture Will Impact Booking Holdings (BKNG) Investors
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (BKNG) reported a strong Q4 2025 profit and revenue beat, driven by increased room nights, bookings, and growth in non-accommodation services. While this performance affirms the company's core model efficiency, the main concern for investors remains the impact of AI on customer acquisition and marketing costs. Booking's strategy to deepen customer relationships through initiatives like the "Connected Trip" aims to counter potential increases in marketing expenses.

feed.title: Vertex Casgevy Rollout Tests Gene Editing Role In Vertex Earnings Story
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals and CRISPR Therapeutics are initiating patient treatments with their gene-editing therapy, Casgevy, approved for sickle cell disease and beta thalassemia. This rollout is critical for Vertex as it aims to diversify beyond its cystic fibrosis focus, with Casgevy expected to contribute to a projected US$500 million in non-CF product revenue for 2026. Investors will closely monitor the real-world adoption, patient access, and payer response to this high-complexity treatment, as these factors will shape Vertex's future earnings and its position in the broader gene-editing market.

feed.title: Raymond James Advisor Hire Adds Scale And Tests Growth Narrative
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (NYSE:RJF) has recruited a private client group team managing $682 million in client assets from a competitor, LPL Financial. This move aims to expand Raymond James's wealth management footprint and scale its private client group business, reinforcing its growth narrative. While the hiring could pressure short-term margins due to integration costs, it also highlights competitive advantages in platform and culture, supporting long-term revenue growth and client relationships.

feed.title: 10 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article details recent "whale activity" in options trading for ten consumer discretionary stocks. It highlights specific bullish, bearish, and neutral option trades for companies like Tesla, Amazon, and Nike, providing strike prices, expiration dates, total trade prices, and contract volumes for each. The report aims to help traders identify potential opportunities based on significant options movements.

feed.title: Envestnet Hires CISO, Evolve Adds Morgan Stanley Alum
feed.summary: Envestnet has appointed Rich Friedberg as its new Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) to enhance cybersecurity protocols, citing his 25 years of experience in financial services and national security. Concurrently, former Morgan Stanley Senior Vice President Brett Cohen has joined Evolve Private Wealth as a managing partner, bringing $800 million in client assets and expanding the firm's national footprint with a new New York office. Additionally, World Investment Advisors has hired Jeffrey Sheftic as Chief Growth Officer to lead advisor recruiting and organic growth initiatives.

feed.title: Deere & Company Q1 FY26 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) reported strong first-quarter FY26 financial results, with net sales and revenues up 13% and equipment operations net sales up 18%. The company highlighted improved order books, particularly in small ag and turf and construction forestry, and increased its industry outlooks for construction and compact construction equipment in North America. Despite challenges in global large ag fundamentals and the South American market, Deere anticipates mid-single-digit net sales growth for its equipment operations in fiscal year 2026, marking the bottom of the current cycle.

feed.title: Bank of America sells Nuveen shares worth $15,036
feed.summary: Bank of America and Merrill Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith INC collectively sold 1,400 common stock shares of Nuveen Municipal Credit Opportunities Fund (NMCO) for $15,036 at $10.7401 per share on February 17, 2026. On the same day, they also acquired 1,400 shares for $15,042 at $10.745 per share. NMCO, with a market cap of $592.61 million, offers a 7.61% dividend yield and exhibits low price volatility.

feed.title: United Airlines Unveils New MileagePlus Rewards Program Features
feed.summary: United Airlines has enhanced its MileagePlus rewards program, significantly increasing mileage earning potential and offering discount benefits for cardholders. While cardholders, especially 1K members, will earn more miles and receive discounts on award tickets and expanded access to Saver Award inventory, non-cardholders will earn fewer miles, particularly on Basic Economy tickets, which incentivizes credit card applications. This strategic move aims to boost customer loyalty and sales for United Airlines.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Financial Companies: Travelers Companies (TRV) and Progressive (PGR)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided insights into financial companies Travelers Companies (TRV) and Progressive (PGR). Evercore ISI maintained a Buy rating on Travelers with a $317.00 price target, reflecting a Moderate Buy consensus. William Blair maintained a Hold rating on Progressive, which also has a Moderate Buy consensus with a $242.80 average price target, suggesting a 16.5% upside.

feed.title: Can Realty Income's Resilient Portfolio Fuel Revenue Growth in Q4?
feed.summary: Realty Income (O) is expected to show stable operational performance and revenue growth in Q4 2025 due to its diversified property portfolio, long-term net lease agreements, and focus on essential goods industries. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Q4 revenues is $1.46 billion, a 9.08% increase year over year, with rental revenues projected at $1.30 billion. The company's expansion efforts and strong performance compared to competitors like Simon Property Group and Kimco Realty also indicate a positive outlook.

feed.title: VRSK Q4 Deep Dive: AI Adoption and Portfolio Refocus Shape Outlook
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) reported Q4 CY2025 revenue above Wall Street expectations, driven by strong subscription growth and AI-powered product innovation, but full-year revenue and EPS guidance missed analyst estimates. The company is refocusing its portfolio by divesting non-core assets and making significant investments in AI, particularly for underwriting and claims solutions, despite anticipating near-term headwinds from a softer pricing environment and lower transactional volumes. Management emphasized that AI and digital innovation will be key drivers of future growth and efficiency within the insurance ecosystem.

feed.title: KraneShares launches AGIX ETF amid market volatility, betting on robust demand for AI technologies
feed.summary: KraneShares has launched AGIX, an exchange-traded fund (ETF), designed to track companies involved in AI hardware, infrastructure, and applications, despite recent volatility in AI stocks. The ETF, with an annual operating expense of 1%, aims to give investors exposure to the growing AI sector, which KraneShares' CIO Brandan Ahern believes has the potential to add trillions in value to the global economy. AGIX includes major tech companies like Microsoft, Nvidia, and Apple among its top holdings, positioning it to capitalize on the sustained demand for AI technologies.

feed.title: Wyndham CEO optimistic about future development despite RevPAR woes
feed.summary: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts reported a decline in global RevPAR for Q4 2025 and the full year, primarily due to an 8% drop in the U.S. Despite this, CEO Geoff Ballotti is optimistic about 2026, citing record room openings in 2025 and strong growth in new construction and conversions. The company expects global RevPAR to stabilize in 2026, projecting a range from down 1.5% to up 0.5%, and anticipates room growth of 4% to 4.5%.

feed.title: Edison International stock hits 52-week high at 72.69 USD
feed.summary: Edison International's stock reached a 52-week high of $72.69, reflecting a strong performance with a 41.32% return over the past year and a 27.44% gain in the last six months. The company maintains a 5.04% dividend yield and has consistently paid dividends for 23 years, showcasing robust growth and investor confidence despite a recent UBS downgrade due to valuation concerns. Recent news includes a 6% dividend increase and Southern California Edison's compensation offer for the Eaton Fire.

feed.title: Oculis Publishes Notifications of Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities and Persons Closely Associated
feed.summary: Oculis Holding AG announced the publication of notifications related to transactions by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and closely associated persons. These notifications pertain to the vesting of earnout shares and the subsequent removal of restrictions on these ordinary shares. The article lists specific notifications for Anthony Rosenberg, Pall Johannesson, Riad Sherif, and Sylvia Cheung.

feed.title: Safe Bulkers Q4 2025 slides: Revenue beat offset by rising costs, dividend maintained
feed.summary: Safe Bulkers Inc. (NYSE:SB) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with revenues exceeding expectations but adjusted EPS falling short due to rising operating costs. The company maintained its quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share, demonstrating a commitment to shareholder returns. Safe Bulkers continues to focus on fleet modernization and strategic management while navigating a cautiously optimistic dry bulk shipping market outlook.

feed.title: MoffettNathanson Adjusts Price Target on Omnicom Group to $95 From $100, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: MoffettNathanson has adjusted its price target for Omnicom Group (OMC) to $95, down from $100, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update comes amidst other analyst adjustments for Omnicom Group on the same day, with BNP Paribas maintaining an Outperform rating and Morgan Stanley maintaining an Equalweight rating, both with reduced price targets. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings which saw adjusted earnings and revenue rise, alongside the announcement of a $5 billion share repurchase program.

feed.title: Companhia Siderurgica Nacional: Can This High?Beta Steel Play Still Reward US Investors?
feed.summary: Companhia Siderurgica Nacional (SID) is presented as a high-beta investment for US investors interested in emerging market cyclicals, infrastructure, and steel. The article explains that SID's performance is influenced more by global economic sentiment, Brazilian macro factors, and US risk appetite than by company-specific news. It provides a detailed analysis of the risks and rewards, fundamental drivers, and how SID fits into a US portfolio, emphasizing its volatility and suitability for tactical allocations rather than core holdings.

feed.title: Will Banking Solutions Tailwinds Help Fidelity National Navigate Q4?
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) is expected to report its Q4 2025 earnings on February 24, 2026, with analysts anticipating a 20.7% year-over-year increase in earnings per share and 5.4% revenue growth, primarily driven by tailwinds in its Banking Solutions and Capital Market Solutions segments. Despite these positive indicators, the company's Earnings ESP of -0.37% and a Zacks Rank #3 suggest it may not conclusively beat earnings estimates this quarter. The article also touches upon the recent earnings performances of other payment industry players like American Express, Mastercard, and Visa.

feed.title: Exelon Commends U.S. Department of the Treasury for Issuing Tax Notice that Addresses Affordability, Promotes Grid Investment
feed.summary: Exelon commended the U.S. Treasury Department for issuing a corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT) notice, which could save its customers up to $200 million over four years and promote critical grid infrastructure investments. This action supports Exelon's new "The Exelon Promise" initiative aimed at addressing energy affordability through various solutions, including a customer relief fund and policy reforms. The company emphasized that this decision helps secure grid reliability and resilience while fostering high-paying jobs.

feed.title: Exelon Commends U.S. Department of the Treasury for Issuing Tax Notice that Addresses Affordability, Promotes Grid Investment
feed.summary: Exelon has praised the U.S. Department of the Treasury for a new corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT) notice, which is expected to save customers up to $200 million over four years and encourage vital infrastructure investments for grid reliability. This announcement, coupled with Exelon's "The Exelon Promise" initiative, aims to tackle energy affordability by supporting customers and investing in the grid. The company emphasizes the urgent need for grid hardening due to rising demand and threats, thanking Congress for leadership on the CAMT issue.

feed.title: Insulet Q4 Earnings Review: Strong Performance Meets Sky-High Expectations (NASDAQ:PODD)
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation (PODD) delivered strong FY2025 results with significant revenue growth and improved operating margins, though its valuation remains demanding. The company projects continued high revenue growth for 2026, driven by untapped diabetes markets. However, intensifying competition and the rise of GLP-1 drugs pose risks to sustained market share, leading the author to maintain a Hold rating due to potentially unsustainable growth expectations priced into the current valuation.

feed.title: P&G at the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference
feed.summary: P&G executives discussed adaptations to its integrated growth strategy at the 2026 CAGNY Conference, addressing external changes like media fragmentation, inflation, and retail evolution. The company plans near-term interventions focusing on consumer-centricity, transforming brand building, and holistic retailer partnerships. P&G aims to leverage its strengths to proactively shape the future of the CPG industry.

feed.title: Wall of Trump Questions Swamps Morgan Stanley Muni Webinar
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's annual "State of the States" webinar, which typically focuses on state balance sheets, saw a significant increase in attendance as financial advisers sought to understand the implications of President Donald Trump's agenda on municipal budgets and bonds. Attendees were particularly interested in how potential federal funding delays and new policies might affect state credit quality. The event highlighted widespread concern about the financial ramifications of Trump's return to power on the municipal bond market.

feed.title: Stifel Raises Price Target on Host Hotels & Resorts to $22 From $20.25, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) to $22 from $20.25, while maintaining a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after the company's recent Q4 2025 earnings call and financial guidance for 2026, which indicated upbeat annual FFO, partly due to the strength of its luxury hotel portfolio. Host Hotels & Resorts specializes in owning and operating hotels across the United States, Brazil, and Canada.

feed.title: Why Is Wyndham (WH) Stock Soaring Today
feed.summary: Wyndham Hotels & Resorts (WH) stock jumped 7.5% following its fourth-quarter earnings report. Despite a revenue miss and weaker-than-expected full-year guidance, investors reacted positively to an earnings beat and a 7.2% year-on-year increase in Revenue per available room (RevPAR). The market seems to be weighing current operational strengths more heavily than future outlook concerns.

feed.title: BALL Corp SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Ball Corporation has released its 2025 10-K report, highlighting a strategic shift towards its core aluminum packaging business following the divestiture of its aerospace unit in 2024. The report details significant financial figures, including $13.161 billion in net sales, alongside outlining business highlights, strategic initiatives such as facility acquisitions and share repurchases, and a future outlook that includes continued capital returns to shareholders. The company also addresses key challenges and risks, including operational, market, regulatory, financial, environmental, and technological factors, and its strategies to manage them.

feed.title: Governor Abbott Announces NRG Energy Expansion In Houston
feed.summary: Governor Greg Abbott announced that NRG Energy, Inc. will construct a new 455-megawatt natural gas power plant at its Greens Bayou facility in Harris County, an investment of $617 million. This project is designated under the Texas Jobs, Energy, Technology, and Innovation (JETI) program and is expected to enhance Texas' energy infrastructure, meet growing energy demands, and create job opportunities. The plant, which secured a Texas Energy Fund loan in November 2025, is projected to begin generating power for the ERCOT region by 2028.

feed.title: BMO Capital Lifts Price Target on J.B. Hunt Transport Services to $245 From $225, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) to $245 from $225, while reiterating an Outperform rating for the company. This adjustment reflects BMO Capital's continued positive outlook on the transportation services provider's stock. The article also provides a brief overview of J.B. Hunt's operations, including its various transportation and logistics services.

feed.title: Will Banking Solutions Tailwinds Help Fidelity National Navigate Q4?
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) is expected to report its Q4 2025 results on February 24, 2026, with an estimated EPS of $1.69 and revenues of $2.74 billion, indicating year-over-year growth. However, the Zacks Earnings ESP of -0.37% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 does not conclusively predict an earnings beat. The company anticipates tailwinds from its Banking Solutions and Capital Market Solutions segments, but these could be partially offset by rising costs.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Cuts Cadence Design Systems Price Target to $375 From $410, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has lowered its price target for Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) to $375 from $410, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst price target changes for the company, suggesting a recalibration based on recent market conditions or company performance. Cadence Design Systems, a leading provider of design software for integrated circuits, continues to be viewed positively by Rothschild & Co Redburn despite the target reduction.

feed.title: Daiwa Securities Adjusts Verizon Communications Price Target to $58 From $48, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Daiwa Securities has raised its price target for Verizon Communications (NYSE: VZ) to $58 from $48, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. The adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the telecommunications giant, indicating increased confidence from the securities firm.

feed.title: Omnicom surges as buyback plan and post-merger update overshadow headline loss
feed.summary: Omnicom (OMC) saw a 13.4% surge in its stock price, driven by the announcement of a new $5 billion share repurchase program and strong fourth-quarter 2025 revenue following its acquisition of Interpublic. Despite a reported net loss due to merger costs, investors reacted positively to increased cost-synergy targets and management's focus on integration. Large institutional investors significantly increased their holdings in OMC in Q4 2025.

feed.title: Why Omnicom Group (OMC) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Omnicom Group (OMC) jumped 12.9% after the company reported mixed fourth-quarter results, with revenue significantly beating expectations but profits missing targets. The strong revenue growth, up 27.9% year-over-year, outweighed concerns about the negative operating margin and lower-than-expected earnings per share. This positive market reaction indicates investors are prioritizing top-line growth and believing that increased demand will eventually lead to improved profitability.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for TPG RE Finance Trust (NYSE:TRTX) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for TPG RE Finance Trust (NYSE:TRTX) from $11.00 to $10.50, though it maintained an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Hold" rating and several other firms also trimming their price targets or downgrading the stock. Despite missing EPS estimates, TRTX surpassed revenue expectations in its latest quarter, and its shares are currently trading around $8.52.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Noble (NYSE:NE) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. recently increased its price target for Noble (NYSE:NE) stock from $33 to $41, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the implied 8.3% downside from the current price. Noble's shares are trading at $44.71, with a market cap of $7.12 billion and a P/E of 33.09, and the company missed quarterly EPS estimates and saw a 17.6% revenue decline year-over-year. Analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating with an average target of $38.63, while institutional ownership is high and insiders have been net sellers.

feed.title: Alphabet Class C (GOOG) stock rises on Google’s Shopee AI deal — what traders watch next
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (GOOG) rose after Google announced a partnership with Sea Ltd to develop an "agentic" AI shopping prototype for Shopee and integrate AI tools into Sea’s Garena gaming arm. The deal also includes payment integration through Sea's financial unit, Monee, targeting innovative AI-driven transactions in Southeast Asia. This development, along with a rebound in overall AI sector sentiment following Nvidia's deal with Meta, pushed Alphabet's stock up, while traders also eye upcoming U.S. PCE inflation reports for macro-economic guidance.

feed.title: Stag Industrial (NYSE:STAG) Price Target Raised to $40.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Stag Industrial (NYSE:STAG) from $39.00 to $40.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This suggests a potential upside of 4.82% from the previous closing price. The real estate investment trust recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.66 EPS and $220.9M in revenue.

feed.title: RELX Adds 1.6 Million Shares to Treasury in Ongoing Buyback Programme
feed.summary: RELX plc has repurchased 1.6 million of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange to be held in treasury, increasing its total treasury holding to 21.39 million shares. This latest transaction brings the total shares bought back since the start of 2026 to 17.28 million, as part of an ongoing capital return program. Analysts currently have a "Buy" rating on RELX stock with a price target of £50.70.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials CO SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing strong financial performance with revenues of $7,941.1 million and net earnings of $1,078.1 million. The report highlights strategic growth through acquisitions, commitment to sustainability, and improved operational efficiency across its aggregates, asphalt, and concrete segments. While the company faces economic and operational risks, it plans to continue expanding and returning value to shareholders through buybacks and dividends.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) Price Target Lowered to $220.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. lowered its price target for Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) to $220.00 while maintaining an "overweight" rating based on the company's strong Q4 earnings, share repurchase program, and dividend increase. Despite exceeding Q4 revenue and EPS estimates, the company's FY2026 guidance was below Street expectations, leading to some short-term uncertainty. Verisk's stock traded up 0.7% with a market cap of $25.83 billion, and analysts currently hold an average "Hold" rating with a consensus price target of $256.14.

feed.title: Grupo Supervielle (NYSE:SUPV) Given New $11.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Grupo Supervielle (NYSE:SUPV) from $12.00 to $11.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, which suggests a limited upside of approximately 1.95% from its previous close. The analyst consensus for SUPV is mostly "Hold" with an average target of $13.00, reflecting a mixed outlook. The company recently missed its earnings estimates for the latest quarter, reporting an EPS of -$0.43 against an expected $0.03, and trades at a high PE ratio of 89.38.

feed.title: Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) Price Target Lowered to $340.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. lowered its price target for Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) from $415.00 to $340.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. Despite a strong earnings beat with $1.55 EPS and 31% year-over-year revenue growth, the stock fell about 5.6% due to cautious near-term guidance. The consensus analyst rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $359.10.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark moves entire ad account to McCann
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark has transitioned its entire advertising account from FCB London to McCann. This move comes after AMV BBDO, which absorbed FCB London following Omnicom's takeover of Interpublic, won the Essity business for the Cushelle brand, a direct competitor to Kimberly-Clark's Andrex. Despite the change, key creative and strategy leads from the Andrex account will remain with AMV BBDO.

feed.title: JCI: Acquisition-driven innovation and strong data center demand fuel double-digit growth outlook
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International (JCI) anticipates double-digit sales growth, driven by its acquisition of Alloy which enhances technology for data center cooling. The company's strategy focuses on AI, mission-critical verticals, and energy efficiency, supported by strong order growth and operational improvements. This outlook is based on a recent Barclays conference transcript.
